idea-plugin.name: CLI AI Commit Generator
idea-plugin.description:
Generates a Conventional Commits message from the changes selected in the commit dialog (file checkboxes and per-hunk inclusion). Pipes the diff into a local CLI AI assistant and streams the result back into the commit message field.

Currently uses Anthropic's claude CLI with the Haiku model. The claude binary must be on PATH and authenticated. Not affiliated with or endorsed by Anthropic.

action.description: Generate a Conventional Commits message from selected changes via local CLI AI
